name: Atlantic City Racquet Club
description: Come play pickleball at Atlantic City Racquet Club in Pleasantville, NJ! There are 3 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Brigantine Beach Community Center
description: Brigantine Beach Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brigantine, NJ. There are 8 hard courts. 6 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, and trainers or lessons.

name: Brigantine Pickleball Club
description: Brigantine Pickleball Club is a place to play pickleball in Brigantine, NJ. There are 4 indoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights, a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, adaptive programming, youth programming, and water. The courts can be reserved.

name: Egg Harbor Township Community Center
description: Egg Harbor Township Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Egg Harbor Township, NJ. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are not available.
fees: Fee required — $5 drop in fee if space permits after 15 minutes of start time.

name: MK Betterment Park
description: Open sun up until 10pm (lights dim at 10, lights off 10:15pm)

name: Montclair Pickleball Atlantic County
description:
Join Montclair Pickleball's Atlantic County location, held at the beautiful Seaview Hotel courts in Galloway, NJ. Montclair Pickleball offers clinics, lessons, tournaments and more led by an incredible team of coaches!
